name: Black Rock RV Village
description: Come play pickleball at Black Rock RV Village in Salome, AZ! There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to lights.

name: Holiday Palms RV Park
description: Come play pickleball at Holiday Palms RV Park in Quartzsite, AZ! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Parker Skate Park
description: Parker Skate Park is a place to play pickleball in Parker, AZ. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.
